title: The Missing Cookies
shortStory: Someone snuck into camp overnight and ate all the cookies.
sceneImageAlt: Scene photo for The Missing Cookies

locations.name: Campsite
locations.teaserText: The campsite looks recently disturbed.

actions.label: Examine the crumbs
actions.description: Inspect traces near the fire pit.
actions.observationText: The snack area was disturbed {movementWord}.

actions.label: Search the tents
actions.observationText: The tents are messy, but nothing points to the culprit.

actions.label: Interview nearby campers
actions.observationText: The witness sounded sleepy, but consistent.

locations.name: Tracks
locations.teaserText: Something passed behind the tents.

actions.label: Measure the tracks
actions.description: Check the size of the tracks.
actions.observationText: The tracks are steady and medium-sized through the dirt.

sizeOverrides.small: The prints stay tight and shallow beside the tents.
sizeOverrides.large: The prints press deeper into the dirt than expected.

actions.label: Follow the tracks
actions.description: Follow where the trail breaks away.
actions.observationText: The tracks break apart into {textureWord} behind the tents.

actions.label: Photograph the tracks
actions.description: Capture the tracks before they blur.
actions.observationText: The picture is clear, but it gives you nothing new.

locations.name: Forest Edge
locations.teaserText: The soil near the roots looks unusual.

actions.label: Check the tree roots
actions.description: Inspect the soil under the roots.
actions.observationText: Something recently worked through the {groundWord} under the roots.

actions.label: Search the branches
actions.description: Check the branches above eye level.
actions.observationText: Broken twigs and leaves make noise, but reveal nothing useful.

actions.label: Listen quietly
actions.observationText: The woods stay still. If someone was here, they are long gone.

locations.name: Cookie Jar
locations.teaserText: The empty jar sits slightly crooked.

actions.label: Inspect the lid
actions.description: Study where the lid was forced open.
actions.observationText: Something scraped hard against the lid before it gave way.

actions.label: Smell the jar
actions.observationText: It only smells sweet and stale. Nothing useful lingers.

actions.label: Check the table
actions.observationText: Whoever reached the jar left crumbs {movementWord} along the edge.

locations.name: Witness Tent
locations.teaserText: A sleepy camper remembers something.

actions.label: Interview the sleepy camper
actions.observationText: The witness is tired, but certain about that detail.

actions.label: Check the wash bucket
actions.description: Inspect the ground by the bucket.
actions.observationText: Even near the water, a line of {textureWord} stayed behind.

actions.label: Search the bedding
actions.observationText: The bedding is warm and crumpled, but it hides nothing useful.

title: The Purloined Page
shortStory: A rare page was torn from a locked book in the library.

locations.name: Reading Room
locations.teaserText: Books are scattered across the floor.

actions.label: Check the floor
actions.description: Look for dropped items near the shelves.
actions.observationText: Books were disturbed {movementWord} from their shelves.

actions.label: Search the armchairs
actions.observationText: The armchairs are rumpled, but nothing is hidden here.

actions.label: Interview the librarian
actions.description: Ask what they heard last night.
actions.observationText: The librarian overheard soft footsteps after hours.

locations.name: Front Desk
locations.teaserText: The desk surface looks disturbed.

actions.label: Measure the marks
actions.description: Check the scuff marks on the counter.
actions.observationText: The scuffs are even and mid-height across the counter.

sizeOverrides.small: Small scuff marks sit low on the desk front.
sizeOverrides.large: Deep scuff marks line the top of the counter.

actions.label: Follow the traces
actions.observationText: A thin line of {textureWord} trails away from the desk.

actions.label: Photograph the desk
actions.description: Capture the surface before it is cleaned.
actions.observationText: The photo shows nothing beyond what you already saw.

locations.name: Rare Books
locations.teaserText: The restricted section has been disturbed.

actions.label: Check the bookcase base
actions.description: Inspect the floor under the shelves.
actions.observationText: The {groundWord} near the bookcase has been disturbed.

actions.label: Search the high shelves
actions.observationText: The high shelves are dusty but undisturbed.

actions.label: Listen for sounds
actions.observationText: The library is silent. No one is hiding here.

locations.name: Study Nook
locations.teaserText: The display case latch looks damaged.

actions.label: Inspect the display case
actions.description: Check where the latch was forced.
actions.observationText: Fresh scoring marks scratch the glass case latch.

actions.label: Check the inkwell
actions.observationText: It smells only of old paper and dust. Nothing stands out.

actions.label: Check the desk
actions.observationText: Whoever took the book left traces {movementWord} along the desk.

locations.name: Staff Office
locations.teaserText: A staff member remembers something odd.

actions.label: Talk to the assistant
actions.observationText: The assistant is certain about that detail.

actions.label: Check the coat rack
actions.description: Inspect the floor by the rack.
actions.observationText: Even by the door, a line of {textureWord} stayed behind.

actions.label: Search the staff cot
actions.observationText: The cot is undisturbed and holds no clues.

height-clue.title: Scattered Pages
height-clue.clueText: Torn pages were scattered {movementWord} near the shelf.

weight-clue.title: Track Impressions
weight-clue.clueText: Track impressions were {trackDepth} in the library carpet.

type-residue-clue.title: Dust Trail
type-residue-clue.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} led between the shelves.

ground-trace-clue.title: Binding Dust
ground-trace-clue.clueText: Fine dust near the shelf showed {groundWord}.

actions.label: Check the sink area

actions.observationText: The couch is rumpled but holds nothing useful.

locations.teaserText: The counter has fresh traces.

actions.label: Check under the shelving

actions.label: Check the top shelves

actions.label: Inspect the cabinet lock

actions.observationText: Fine scratch marks circle the cabinet lock.

actions.label: Smell the cabinet
actions.observationText: It smells of old wood and polish. Nothing useful.

actions.label: Check the dining table
actions.observationText: Whoever took from the cabinet worked {movementWord} along the table.

locations.name: Back Alley

actions.observationText: The delivery person is certain about the detail.

actions.label: Check the delivery crates
actions.observationText: The crates are stacked neatly. Nothing is hidden.

force-clue.endExplanation: The culprit left {forceTrace} while forcing the pantry open.
